main.description: The specific viewing rights granted to a user or subscriber class.

name.description: Display name of the entitlement (e.g., 'Premium Sports Package', 'Hager Rental').

licenseType.description: The underlying business model of the right.

targetRefs.description: The AT-URIs of the catalog assets, collections, or linear channels this entitlement unlocks.

baseGeoPolicy.description: The baseline geographic restrictions for this entitlement.
